'''鈭歮-b-sh-m''' ('''kamabshemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yarnstorm|yarnstorm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-b-sh-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yarnstorm|yarnstorm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-b-sh-m
|-
! Lemma
| kamabshemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimabshemoko|thimabshemoko]] || [[word:jimabshemoko|jimabshemoko]] || [[word:shimabshemoko|shimabshemoko]] || [[word:kimabshemoko|kimabshemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mabshemoko|th忙mabshemoko]] || [[word:j忙mabshemoko|j忙mabshemoko]] || [[word:sh忙mabshemoko|sh忙mabshemoko]] || [[word:k忙mabshemoko|k忙mabshemoko]]
|-

|-

|}
